title: hypecoum procumbens subsp. grandiflorum
intro: Hypecoum procumbens subsp. grandiflorum, also known as the large-flowered Hypecoum or yellow rocket, is a perennial plant in the borage family that is native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, and is known to have a range of health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared using various herbal methods, including drying and infusing the flowers in hot water to create a tea, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments. In addition to its medicinal uses, Hypecoum procumbens subsp. grandiflorum is also valued for its ornamental flowers, which bloom in the summer months and attract pollinators to the area.
